title: Nummularia punctata

Nummularia punctata belongs to the kingdom Fungi and the phylum Ascomycota. It is further classified as a member of the class Sordariomycetes and the order Sordariales. Nummularia punctata's classification is a reflection of its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.

intro: Nummularia punctata, also known as the Australian saltbrush, is a species of shrub native to eastern Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including wound healing, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory effects.
